check.template:
Run typecheck, lint, and formatting check: `pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format:check`
Fix any issues found.

push.description: Stage, review, check, commit, and push
push.template: Run `git status --short` and `git diff --stat` to show changes and ask the user for confirmation. If confirmed, run typecheck + lint + format check and fix any issues. Then read `git diff` to understand the actual changes and generate a meaningful conventional commit message. Show the user the suggested message and let them confirm or edit it. Then commit and push.
